title: Streaming output chunk
description: One chunk in a streaming-capable dispatch. Phase 7 da nirvana-evolution.

chunk_id.description: UUID or stable id within the trace. Unique.

sequence.description: 0-based monotonically increasing order within the trace.

content.description: The chunk body (markdown, text, base64 if binary).

parent_trace_id.description: trace_id of the parent dispatch this chunk belongs to.

is_final.description: True when this is the last chunk; triggers full gate on aggregated output.

partial_gate_result.description: Optional subset-rubric verdict for this chunk alone.
